data.title: KISS Colors & Care Expands Its Styling and Care Portfolio with Performance-Driven Innovations for Coils, Curls and Waves
data.description: A renowned textured hair brand, KISS Colors & Care, recently unveiled cutting-edge styling technology, fragrant mists, and scalp care products tailored for textured hair. These innovative products are aimed at providing comprehensive support for textured hair at all stages. The launch took place in Port Washington, New York on April 3, 2026. KISS Colors & Care is an award-winning brand in the beauty supply industry, recognized for its commitment to catering to diverse hair needs.

data.title: Ponce Bank Ranked Among Top 50 Best-Performing U.S. Community Banks by S&P Global Market Intelligence
data.description: In the Bronx, New York, on April 3, 2026, Ponce Bank, National Association, a banking subsidiary of Ponce Financial Group, Inc., was acknowledged by S&P Global Market Intelligence. They were named one of the Top 50 Best-Performing U.S. Community Banks of 2025 in the asset range of $3 billion to $10 billion. Their ranking nationally was at #40. This acknowledgment highlights the bank's robust financial results and dedication to making a positive impact on the community and promoting inclusive growth.

data.title: Doheny Eye Institute Welcomes Alicia Cleaver as Chief Development Officer with Support from Envision Consulting
data.description: Alicia Cleaver has been appointed as the new Chief Development Officer at Doheny Eye Institute in Los Angeles on April 3, 2026. The institute, in collaboration with Envision Consulting, made this announcement marking a significant milestone. Cleaver's appointment comes as Doheny Eye Institute is in a phase of growth and aims to enhance its influence in the field.

data.title: Moonbounce Launches with $12M to Give Organizations Real-Time Control Over AI Behavior
data.description: A company called Moonbounce, based in Oakland, California, has recently announced its launch of an AI control engine that guarantees systems operate as intended regardless of size. The launch comes with a significant funding of $12 million, with primary investments from Amplify Partners and StepStone Group (Nasdaq: STEP), along with contributions from angel investors PrimeSet and Josh Leslie, former CEO of Cumulus Networks and Gremlin. This launch is particularly relevant as generative AI becomes more prevalent in various sectors, shaking up traditional content moderation methods that rely on reactive assessments, inflexible regulations, and manual interventions.

data.title: Jet Linx Introduces New Owner Aircraft Exchange to Eliminate Downtime for Aircraft Owners
data.description: Jet Linx, a private jet operator based in OMAHA, Neb., unveiled a novel program on April 3, 2026. This innovative Owner Aircraft Exchange allows aircraft owners to swap their jets when undergoing maintenance. Leveraging its extensive fleet across the country, the company ensures seamless transitions for owners. This initiative aims to address downtime concerns and enhance operational efficiency. Jet Linx's nationwide reach and fleet strength make this program stand out in the industry.

data.title: Dress for Success Southern Nevada to Host 2026 Success Showcase Luncheon
data.description: A significant event is set to take place in Las Vegas on April 17, 2026, as Dress for Success Southern Nevada will be organizing its annual Success Showcase Luncheon. The event aims to shine a spotlight on client transformation stories, underscoring the impact the organization has had on women in the region. By sharing these success stories, Dress for Success hopes to raise critical funds to further support women in need across Southern Nevada. This event is crucial for the organization's mission to serve more women and expand its reach. The important numbers include the date of the luncheon (April 17, 2026) and the geographical area of focus (Southern Nevada).

data.title: Ridgetech, Inc. Announces 1-for-150 Reverse Share Split
data.description: Ridgetech, Inc., a Cayman Islands exempted company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol RDGT, based in Hangzhou, China, has revealed plans for a reverse share split. The wholesale distributor of pharmaceutical and healthcare products in China aims to execute a 1-for-150 reverse share split. This move is anticipated to consolidate the shares of the Company, potentially impacting their stock value.

data.title: University of Phoenix Wins Six 2026 ADDY® Awards Including Three Golds in for Creative Excellence Across Video, Digital and Documentary Storytelling
data.description: University of Phoenix has achieved success in the American Advertising Awards, also known as ADDY® Awards, by winning a total of six awards. Among these accolades are three Gold ADDY® Awards. This achievement has allowed them to advance to the next level of the competition, the District-level American Advertising Awards. The awards were received from the Phoenix Chapter, with the results announced on April 3, 2026.

data.title: Proposed appointment to the Board of Directors at the Annual General Meeting on May 21st, 2026: Thierry Fournier candidate director – Appointed censor with immediate effect
data.description: Thierry Fournier has been nominated as a candidate director for the Board of Directors at the Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026. Following the meeting, Fournier has been appointed as a censor with immediate effect.
